description: Same shape as clean.pwn but with thousands of unused locals and a float-equality comparison, so a lint pass with unused-local and float-equality enabled reports many findings. Exercises diagnostic-heavy lint latency. Generated by tools/genperf -kind=pathological -inject-diagnostics.

expected.notes: Diagnostic count scales with -lines; unused-local and float-equality must be enabled (they are off by default) to observe findings.
